Localization.Description: Aggregation of events with id "PT_Cisco_ASA_FWSM_PIX_syslog_710005_TCP_UDP_request_discarded": from 4th up to 100th within 5 minutes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Aggregated event. {event_src.host}: {protocol} request from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is discarded
